title: Field
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Field composition helpers layered over local Base UI Field semantics with base-nova Field, FieldSet, FieldLegend, FieldGroup, FieldContent, FieldLabel, FieldDescription, FieldSeparator, FieldTitle, and FieldError classes.

examples.title: FieldInput
examples.description: FieldSet, FieldGroup, Field, FieldLabel, Input, and FieldDescription composition.

examples.title: FieldCheckbox
examples.description: Checkbox, horizontal Field, FieldContent, and FieldSeparator composition.

examples.title: FieldResponsive
examples.description: Responsive orientation Field with Input and Button composition.

examples.title: FieldRtl
examples.description: RTL Field composition using local static strings instead of the origin language selector.

examples.title: FieldOriginFixture
examples.description: Static origin-evidence fixture derived from base-nova Field source.

examples.title: FieldFoldkitFixture
examples.description: Foldkit parity fixture for dependency-complete shadcn Field composition.

deviations.summary: CVA orientation variants are represented by Effect Schema literals and pure class maps.
deviations.rationale: Installable source avoids CVA while preserving the pinned base-nova class strings.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local static strings instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local RTL strings preserve direction and field semantics without adding an app-only dependency.

deviations.summary: Origin examples requiring missing Select or app-only dependencies are not installable examples.
deviations.rationale: The plan forbids adding runtime dependencies for components that are not dependency-complete. Those examples remain origin evidence until their dependencies are available.

deviations.summary: Parity origin fixture uses static source-derived markup for dependency-complete Field composition.
deviations.rationale: The fixture proves the base-nova slots and class tokens without pulling React, CVA, or app-only dependencies into installable source.
